subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath been received, and its contents have become known. In response to the person mentioned, an exalted Tablet hath been revealed and sent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و مضمون آن معلوم آمد در جواب نفس مذکور لوحی منیع نازل و ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @wisdom [hikmat]
